data.title: Delta Air Lines, Kura Sushi And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Wednesday
data.description: U.S. stock futures down, focus on Delta Air, Kura Sushi, Simply Good Foods earnings. Aehr Test beats estimates, Constellation Brands reports after bell.

data.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang Doesn't Want To Be Elon Musk, Reveals His Biographer: 'He Hates Science Fiction'
data.description: In a biography by Stephen Witt, "The Thinking Machine: Jensen Huang, Nvidia, and the World's Most Coveted Microchip," readers are given a peek into the life and career of Nvidia's (NASDAQ: NVDA) CEO, Jensen Huang.

data.title: Cathie Wood Points To 'Serious Liquidity Issues' As Overnight Borrowing Rate Spreads Widen On Spiking Treasury Yields: 'This Crisis Is Calling Out For Some Kind Of Mar-a-Lago Accord'
data.description: Following a jump in the U.S. Treasury yields, the SOFR swap spreads have widened, signaling a "serious liquidity" issue.

data.title: Anthony Scaramucci Rode His BTC Boat Through Choppy Waters Of 2022 Bear Market: 'Didn't Sell Any Bitcoin There, And I Was Rewarded'
data.description: Anthony Scaramucci, founder and managing partner of SkyBridge Capital, reflected on his unwavering faith in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) on Tuesday despite being mocked for it in the past.

data.title: Want To Succeed Like Warren Buffett? It Might All Come Down To Who You Surround Yourself With: 'Pick The Right People'
data.description: Billionaire Warren Buffett, who became a millionaire by age 32, shares his secret to success with Gen Z: it's not just about hard work, but also about the company you keep.
